titleStmt.title: SII 9.298: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 298. (A.R. No. 327 of 1925.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE COMPOUND OF THE HANUMAN TEMPLE AT NAGENAHALLI, RAYADURG TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: The inscription is dated Śaka 1118, Naḷa, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkramaṇa, corresponding probably to A.D. 1196 December 25, Wednesday; the date is not verifiable for want of details. It belongs to a period after the time of the Kalachurya king Saṅkama, when the Yādavas and the Hoysaḷas were trying to take possession of portions of the Chālukya dominions. During the regime of the Chōḷa chief Tribhuvanamalla-Bhōgadēva, Siṅgaya-Heggaḍe, son of Vāmarasa and Nāgaladēvi and chief of Chandeyamaṅgala, situated in Kaṇiyakalla-nāḍu, is stated to have built the temples of Kannēśvara, Bhairava and Mallikārjuna and endowed them with lands and money contributed from taxes. Haḍapada-Rāchayya, a subordinate of Bhōgadēva, is stated to have been administering Kaṇiyakallu-nāḍu. Mārarasa dictated and Bāchaṇṇa of Kōḷūr wrote this inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
daṁḍavivahu kuṁtaḷaṇiha kuṁtaḷasaptārddhalakhkha
va pāḷippaṇavanoḷu guttaṁ mauriyakuḷa
saṁbhava raṭṭakūṭabhūpāḷa . Alliṁdaṁ . baḷikādaṁ
cāḷukyaroḷeḷeyaṁ permmāḍirāyanalliṁ baḷikaṁ
kaḷacuriyaroḷāḷdaṁ bhūtaḷamaṁ kaḍugaliye
ṁba bijjaṇadēvaṁ . bijjaṇadēvaṁga saṁ
kamanaipaṁ tanūbhava mūrttisamastakaḷā
vidanādaṁ sapuṇya pṛthvīvallabha ma
hārājādhirāja kaḷacuri dēvānaṁtaraṁ
vikramagālaṁ saluttamire lavāpūrṇnata
ṭākadiṁ phalabharānamra lagaḷiṁ baḷada
śāḷibrātadi baḷuva pūganā
gakadaḷīpu saṁkuladiṁdoppuva
tōṁṭadiṁ sogayi meyuṁ .
toḷapiṁde ratnamoppe vantānāḷke ro
ddadā bīḍoppe ṭinā
rppina kaḍunanniya vajanadodavi
ṁdaṁ . Inavaṁśasaṁbhavaṁ tānenisidiruṁ
gōḷanṛpatige janiyisidaṁ
baṁṭarabāva vacōḷanṛpanada
nāḷvaṁ . Antā bhōganṛpāḷaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭa
pratipāḷanārtthaṁ rakṣisuttamiralā nā
ḍoḷ . beḷage diṁ beḷadoṟa
gidu guyyala hagariya ha
riyaṁbaḍa kaṁgoḷisirkkuṁ
kaṇiyakallu daṁ kaḍugali
bhōganṛpāḷana haḍapada rēcayyanola
viniṁ pāḷisu yatāṁ
kiḍisade palariṁ paḍiyuttaṁ .
surataruge pa kā dēvi rājipantese
va kaṇiyakallā nāḍoḷ varacaṁdeyamaṁ
gaḷapura virājisi tāṁ podaḷdasiriyo
daviṁdaṁ . vāmarasaṁgaṁ tatpriyakā
mini nāgalegamudayisidanakhiḷagu
ṇōddāmaṁ siṁgeyaheggaḍe bhūmisu
tanolaviniṁdadaṁ pāḷisuvaṁ . Ātana ku
lavadhu bhuvanakhyāteyenal negaḷda heggaḍi
ti mācale saṁprītiyoḷe patige yō
jipaḷātatasaddharmmadesapudeṁbī bageyaṁ .
kaṁnēśvarabhairavagṛhama negaḷdūriṁde pora
geyūroḷ gṛhamaṁ ceṁnamare
mallikārjjunakaṁ nere māḍisidanose
du haggaḍesiṁga . svasti śrīmanmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamalla bhōgadēvacō

ḷamahārājaru sakanakālaṁ
1118 sale naḷasaṁvatsaradu
ttarāyaṇasaṁkramaṇanimi
ttamāgi caṁdeyamaṁga
ḷada mūliga siṁgeyahe
ggaḍe māḍisida Ūroḷaga
ṇa mallikārjunadēvarggaṁ
poṟagaṇa bhairava
dēvarggaṁ kaṁnēśvaradēvara
keyyiṁ mūḍale biṭṭa
mattaru 1 ka 450
poragaṇa kaṁnēśvaradēvarggaṁ
rāmanāthadēvarggaṁ
haraḷabeṁceyiṁ mūḍa
lanādikāladiṁ naḍavu
ttirdda mattaru 2 ka 450 gu
yyalalu nellu kha 1
soḍareṇnege gāṇa 3
māṟakoṭṭukoṁḍalli batta mā
na 2 Inisakkaṁ ka
lyāṇaśaktiya maga
būpajīyanoḍeya .
brahmapuribammarasaṁge ma
ttaru 1 brahmapurimaṁ
cimarasaṁge matturu 1
karuvage mattaru 1
kimeyage kaṁba 450
bāligaṁge 450
bhaḷāri cōduṁbeyaṁge
mattaru 1 [*.] svadattāṁpa
radattāṁ vā yō harētu
vasuṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasa
hasrāṇi miṣṭhāyāṁ
jāyatē kṛmiḥ .
siṁ baṁmayyaṁ
ge mattaru 1

nirupamatārakāvaḷiga
ḷiṁ paripūrṇaśaśāṁka
noppuvantire negaḷda
nvayānvitarenippa tadaṁ
gadoḷaṁgadaṁḍava
dhariyisi niṁda tanna sukha
vṛddhisamanvitarappa tatpra
jāparikaradiṁde siṁga
manesappanavarggaḷa nāma
veṁtenal . maddeyagā
vuṁḍaṁ Ājceyagāvu2ṁḍa
māḷagāvuṁḍa dēkeya
bōkeyagāvuṁḍa kū
kaṭeyēcama beṭṭagāvuṁ
ḍa gūḍeya yaṇa
cāmagāvuṁḍa mā
layakētagāvuṁḍa .
Ivarādiyāge taṁno
ppuva gōtramumi
ṣṭaśiṣṭaruṁ baṁdhuga
ḷuṁ divajēṁdravi
bhavadi va caṁde
yamaṁgaḷadoḷire
sukhadiṁdaṁ ..
Ī śāsanamaṁ mārama
rasaṁ pēḷdaṁ kōḷūra bā
caṇnaṁ baredaṁ © śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
